creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I would really like it if in-tree clang would just always use the in-tree linker and not try to find a "better" linker using the triple.  I think though you would still have the problem of clang from ports also happily using ld.bfd from binutils instead of its associated ld.lld by default.  Ideally the LLVM ports toolchains would prefer to use all their own bits as well unless told otherwise via -B, etc.
